---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a workflow or maintainability improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the requested improvement.

## Problem Statement

What limitation or pain point does this solve?

## Proposed Change

Describe the expected behavior or implementation direction.

## Affected Areas

- Request flow
- Tracking flow
- Tech dashboard
- Approval flow
- Finance flow
- Notifications
- Setup / configuration
- Documentation

## Additional Notes

List risks, migration concerns, or business rules that must stay intact.
